purpose: Compact source map from SONIFICATION to reviewed QEC releases, tests, experiments, and reusable implementation ideas.

usedForTannerTuningFork.adaptation: Reimplemented as dependency-free ESM; QEC eigensolver and optimizer behavior were not copied.

usedFor: global phase and edge-pairing test ideas
usedForTannerTuningFork.warning: The C8 fixture lies exactly on the bulk-radius boundary; its existing allclose test is not replay determinism. SONIFICATION uses exact matrix-power goldens instead.

usedFor: Tanner adjacency and Laplacian sanity patterns

candidatesForLater.possibleUse: Canonical mode-event tables before deterministic PCM rendering.
candidatesForLater.note: Reuse the event and hashing primitives, not repeated governance fields.

candidatesForLater.warning: Correct the np.lexsort key priority and add input-permutation tests before reuse.

candidatesForLater.possibleUse: Form, section, or timbre-state maps; not primary pitch calibration.
Named timbre and stability states after metrics are revalidated.
Offline comparison of candidate spectral-to-audio relationships; never automatic truth claims.

candidatesForLater.warning: QEC ternary decoder messages {-1,0,+1} are not labelled GF(3) Tanner coefficients or qutrit algebra.

candidatesForLater.possibleUse: Oscillator, envelope, and WAV scaffolding after replacing authored pitch tables.
candidatesForLater.warning: Its final peak normalization cancels the current global stability-to-amplitude mapping.

candidatesForLater.possibleUse: Before-and-after graph retuning demonstrations using a corrected operator path.
Canonical JSON and SHA helpers for run caches.
candidatesForLater.warning: Environment, dirty-state, and timestamp fields must not define the instrument hash.

doNotReuseAsAuthority.reason: Builds destination-to-destination transitions instead of the Hashimoto (u->v)->(v->w) rule; a tree incorrectly reports nonzero spectral radius.
These paths inherit or depend on the incorrect legacy nonbacktracking construction.
They label normalized max_flow, normally 1, as spectral_radius.
Their musical ratios and E8/triality labels are authored or mathematically inconsistent; SONIFICATION remains the E8 authority.
Not suitable as a microtonal tuning exporter without timing, mapping, and pitch-bend redesign.

identityBoundary.tannerInstrumentHash: Hash the exact labelled sparse matrix, including GF(3) coefficients and fixed row/column labels.
identityBoundary.codeEquivalenceHash: A future GF(3) row-space/RREF hash is a separate identity and must not replace the Tanner matrix before spectral construction.
identityBoundary.eigenspaces: Serialize grouped eigenvalues and projectors, not arbitrary individual eigenvectors inside degenerate spaces.

licenseNote: Check the SPDX header and repository license of each source before copying code. This index records technical provenance and is not a license grant.
